title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Howrah team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions:
Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
